# Session: 2026-07-13 — eShop Dev Setup & Run

## Status: ✅ App is running

## What was done
1. Discovered .NET SDK was 6.0.400 (too old — project needs 10.0)
2. Installed .NET 10 via `brew install dotnet`
3. Fixed symlink conflict: `rm /usr/local/bin/dotnet && brew link --overwrite dotnet`
4. Fixed Docker credential issue: removed `"credsStore": "desktop"` from `~/.docker/config.json` (incompatible with Colima)
5. Trusted HTTPS dev cert: `dotnet dev-certs https --trust`
6. Started the app: `dotnet run --project src/eShop.AppHost/eShop.AppHost.csproj`
7. All services came up healthy (RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL, Redis, all APIs)

## Current State
- App running in terminal (token changes each run — check terminal output for new URL)
- Aspire dashboard: https://localhost:19888 (token changes each run)
- All 17 resources: Running/Healthy
- Web store: accessible via "Online Store" link on dashboard

## To Resume After VS Code Restart
```bash
cd /Users/weidong.tang/projs/slalom/boston-202607/team-5-Hal/aeai-dotnet-brownfield
colima status  # ensure Colima is running
dotnet run --project src/eShop.AppHost/eShop.AppHost.csproj
```
Then open the dashboard URL from the console output.
